data.name: 公主的樂園
data.detailed_description:
自從成功地研究出了強大的魔術後，帝國便不斷地向鄰國發動戰爭以擴張領土。

以某件事為分界線，帝國的公主・卡娜莉雅和她的隨從艾歐拉一起被趕到了隔離小屋中生活。

在無趣的日常中，卡娜莉雅偶然看見鄰國騎士團的俘虜被帶進了城裡。

於是，卡娜莉雅便向自己的父親，也就是皇帝這麼說道──

「我想要那個人呀。」

公主的生存軌跡與兩個男人的心就此交會。

卡娜莉雅（CV：風鈴みすず）

本作的主角。

有著美麗的容貌，和連親生父親都為之迷戀的肉體。

是曾為娼婦，卻憑藉著自己的外貌和聰慧成為妃子的母親為了穩固地位而生下的女兒。

從小就被教導了該如何將男人玩弄於股掌之間。

在母親死於謀殺後便被排擠出權力中心。

被趕到了城堡深處原本用來隔離瘟疫患者的建物中生活。

萊納斯（CV：初時チェリー）

是在戰爭中被攻陷的鄰國的騎士。

因為自尊心高，所以個性也比較尖銳。

他的劍並非為了獻給國王或神明，而是只為了自己的自尊心而揮舞。

對將忠誠奉獻給王或神沒有任何興趣，他手中的劍只打算為了自己而揮舞。

有點厭女，所以即使周圍人都勸他早點結婚，他至今也是連個戀人都沒有。

脖子上戴有防止他加害城裡的人的『魔石』項圈，

所以不管他嘴上怎麼罵，都沒辦法真正動手。

很容易輸給快感。

艾歐拉（CV：井伊筋肉）

在帝國統治下的小國深處生活的族人之一。

被卡娜莉雅的母親看中，成為僕人。

理解卡娜莉雅的孤獨，成為她的陪伴者。

負責卡娜莉雅的生活，如外出購物，準備飯食等。

原本是有著不使用“文字”的文化，但在為卡娜莉雅服務後，

受她的鼓勵學會了閱讀和寫作。現在喜歡閱讀書籍。

受到卡娜莉雅的說話方式和書籍的影響，表達方式生硬。

特技是潮吹。

『公主的樂園』是一款R18的女攻文字冒險遊戲。

・在這款遊戲中，戀愛與性行為的主導權全都掌握在女性主角手裡，

　您將可以看到主角將或不情願或醉心於此的男人都變成自己的俘虜。

・遊戲過程中，雖然也會有男性器插入主角的性器或屁股的描寫，

　但主角的精神永遠處於支配地位，這個上下關係是不會被改變的。

・登場的兩個男人因對主角有精神上的崇拜／敗北感／服從／憐憫而無法違逆主角。

・適合喜歡看女性攻方用快感讓男方陷落的玩家。

data.short_description: 娼婦之女－公主「卡娜莉雅」從小被教導如何將男人玩弄於股掌之間，決定在最後的日子向皇帝父親要來帥氣的鄰國騎士好好放縱一番。 「我想要那個人呀。」 公主的生存軌跡與兩個男人的心就此交會。 — 這是一款將傳統故事中的支配性別顛覆，且欲望滿滿的視覺小說。
data.supported_languages:
日文*, 繁體中文, 英文, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows® 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.name: Princess Paradise
data.detailed_description:
Since successfully developing powerful magic, the empire has continued to wage wars against neighboring countries to expand its territory.

Due to something as a dividing line, the empire's princess Kanalia and her attendant Iola were driven to live in an isolation hut.

In her boring daily life, Kanalia accidentally saw prisoners of the neighboring knights being brought into the city.

So, Kanalia said to her father, the emperor──

"I want that person."

The princess's life trajectory intersects with the hearts of the two men.

■Kanalia(CV:風鈴みすず)

She has a beautiful appearance and a body that even her father is obsessed with.

She's born in order to stabilize her mother's place, who was once a prostitute but became a concubine.

By virtue of her appearance and intelligence.

From an early age, she was taught how to manipulate men.

After her mother died of murder, she was pushed out of the center of power.

She was driven deep into the castle to live in a building originally used to isolate plague patients.

■Lynas(CV:初時チェリー)

He is a knight from a neighboring country that was captured in the war.

Because of his high self-esteem, his personality is also sharp.

He has no interest in devoting his loyalty to the king or the god, and the sword in his hand is intended to be wielded only for himself.

He is a bit misogynistic, so even though people around him advise him to get married early, he still doesn't have a lover yet.

He wears a "magic stone" collar around his neck to prevent him from harming people in the city.

So no matter how much he cursed, he couldn't really take action.

It's easy to lose to the pleasure.

■Iola(CV:井伊筋肉)

He is a member of a certain ethnic group living in a remote area of ​​a small country under the rule of an empire.

After being spotted by Kanalia's mother, he became Kanalia's follower.

Purchasing supplies, preparing food and taking care of Kanalia are all his jobs.

A being who understands Kanalia's loneliness and stays by her side.

Originally, his nation did not have the culture of "word".

"But since he became Kanalia's follower,

he learned to read and write under her advice,

and now he enjoys reading all kinds of books."

Influenced by Kanalia's tone and books, he can use some hard words.

His special trick is squirting.

Princess Paradise is an R18 female-oriented text adventure game.

・In this game, all the control over love and sex is in the hands of the female protagonist.

・You'll see the protagonist make men her captives, either unwillingly or intoxicatedly.

・During the game, although there are also descriptions of male penis being inserted into the protagonist’s genitals or butt,

But the protagonist's spirit will always be in a dominant position, and this upper and lower relationship will not be changed.

・The two men on the stage cannot disobey the protagonist because of their spiritual admiration/sense of defeat/obedience/compassion for the protagonist.

・Suitable for players who like to watch female attackers use pleasure to make men fall.

data.supported_languages:
Japanese*, Traditional Chinese, English, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows® 10
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • Processor: 2+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
